title: Floating Candles
description: Place floating candles without support blocks.
body:
Candles can float in vanilla, but they can't be placed into air. That makes placing lots of magical hovering lights tedious. Oddly, this used to be a vanilla feature when candles were first added, but then it was patched out...

Want to skip the support blocks? **Floating Candles** lets you do that! Place candles anywhere, even on other candles!

This mod works in singleplayer and on the server side for multiplayer.
